name: talaria
description: Instant email credibility, in your voice. Paste a URL, get a draft + 2-page research brief.

scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace functions run build && npm --workspace web run build
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:shared && npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:shared && npm run build:web && firebase deploy --only hosting
